channel.title: 2026年 on 记录每个瞬间
channel.description: Recent content in 2026年 on 记录每个瞬间

item.title: Claude code 源码分析
item.description: claude code v2.1.88 泄漏的源码分析，包括五层架构：入口层、运行时层、引擎层、工具层、基础设施层

item.title: Iran War
item.description: This article provides a comprehensive analysis of the Iran War through a 6-dimension framework (What, Why, How,Who Else, So What, What Next) and 13 key points. It examines the ongoing military conflict between Iran and the U.S.-Israel coalition, covering escalating airstrikes, missile exchanges, and the strategic tensions around the Strait of Hormuz. The analysis explores the root causes including Iran"s nuclear program, regional power competition, and the breakdown of diplomacy. It presents three future scenarios: U.S.-Israel victory, Iranian strategic success, or prolonged stalemate—with the latter deemed most likely. The article details military tactics (air campaigns, drone warfare, asymmetric strategies), cyber warfare, energy weaponization, and the global economic impact including oil price shocks and supply chain disruption. It also addresses regional spillover through proxy groups, great power competition involving China and Russia, diplomatic efforts, Iran"s domestic political stability, humanitarian consequences, and long-term implications for Middle East security architecture and nuclear proliferation risks.

item.title: 国内外模型和云厂商汇总
item.description: 国内外主流模型、云厂商汇总

item.title: 云南滇西大环线
item.description: 云南滇西大环线，沧源：广允缅寺、葫芦小镇、摸你黑广场、翁丁原始部落、班洪葫芦王地景区、班洪村、沧源崖画、千米国画长廊、司岗里溶洞、天坑、龙乃村、永和新村、永和口岸； 瑞丽：一寨两国、瑞丽古城、姐告口岸、喊沙村、大等贺村、弄莫湖公园、独树成林、姐勒金塔、莫里热带雨林、畹町口岸、总佛寺和傣王宫； 芒市：大金塔、大银塔、树包塔、菩提寺、勐巴娜西珍奇园、菩提街、芒市生态田园观光区、板过河湿地公园、芒市广场、孔雀湖公园、德宏州博物馆、傣族古镇、丙午街、德宏州博物馆
